title: PopoverPanel
description: Internal primitive used by floating components (Select, MultiSelect, DropdownMenu, Tooltip, DateField, Combobox…). Renders a panel teleported to body while preserving the provider's theme and palette.

tooltip.title: Tooltip
tooltip.desc: Tooltip uses its own positioning system, similar to PopoverPanel.

select.title: Select
select.desc: The Select dropdown renders inside a PopoverPanel.

direct.title: Direct usage
direct.desc: Combine usePopover (open, panelStyle, panelRef) with PopoverPanel for cases not covered by high-level components.

demo.tooltipText: I'm a popover anchored to the trigger
demo.directNote: For common cases (menus, selects, tooltips) use the high-level components that already integrate

props.radius: Corner radius. Inherits from the provider when not set.
props.role: ARIA role applied to the panel.
props.labelledBy: Id of the element that labels the panel.

emits.updatePanelRef: Emitted when the root element changes. Required so usePopover can position it.
